title: Device Home Screen - Connecting Headset when device list is empty
scenario: Newly connected headset does not appear in Poly Studio Mobile app device list when returning from Bluetooth menu with empty home screen
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and ensure the Home screen is displayed with an empty device list (no previously paired devices shown).
2. Open the device's system Bluetooth settings menu.
3. Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth headset (e.g., Poly Voyager 5200) via the system Bluetooth menu.
4. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app (navigate back to the Home screen).
5. Observe the device list on the Home screen.
expected: The newly connected headset should appear in the app's device list on the Home screen.
